basic_details.job_title: ICSI Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026 – 20 Vacancies, Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has released Advertisement No. 04/2026 inviting online applications for 20 Executive Assistant posts at its Headquarters (New Delhi/Noida), CCGRTs (Mumbai, Kolkata, Hyderabad & Manesar), Regional Offices (New Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai & Chennai), and Chapter Offices across India. The online application link is active from 22 July 2026 to 12 August 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee has been specified in the notification.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for the post of Executive Assistant, as on 01 July 2026, is 35 years.

qualification.details: Graduate in Commerce. | Minimum 3 years of experience. Training experience forming a part of the curriculum of any Degree/Diploma will not be counted towards the total experience. | The indicative job contents for candidates selected for Chapter Offices are as follows: | To take day-to-day decisions for smooth working of the Chapter office and to improve the services of members/students in consultation with the Chairman To operate the bank accounts jointly with the office bearers of the Chapter, within certain monetary limits as may be decided by the Regional Council/Chapter To initial all the receipt & payment vouchers before placing the same to the Chairman/Treasurer for approval To attend all the meetings of the Managing Committee of the Chapter and to assist the Secretary in drafting the agenda/minutes To strictly follow the purchase procedure/manual for procuring material/services, with the proprietary aspect of all expenses specifically looked into To authenticate all the MIS reports or reports required to be sent to various Directorates of the Headquarters Such other duties as may be assigned from time to time by the Headquarters of the Institute | The job contents for candidates selected for offices other than Chapter Offices will be as decided by the respective Directorate/Office.

selection_process: Selection will be made through a Written Test of Objective Type (MCQ)
Basic Accounting General English Basic Mathematics Computer Knowledge Quantitative Aptitude Reasoning General Knowledge & Current Affairs

Mere submission of application or fulfilment of eligibility conditions does not confer any right on a candidate to be shortlisted or called for the written test. ICSI reserves the right to call for the written test only those candidates who
are most suitable for the post
and reserves the right to reject any or all applications without assigning any reason. ICSI's decision on eligibility
and selection will be final and binding
and no correspondence will be entertained in this regard. No Travel Allowance shall be reimbursed for attending the written test.
how_to_apply: Fill the online Resume Form carefully, ensuring all relevant fields relating to qualifications, experience, etc. are duly completed.

Avoid entering special characters (such as " ", ' ', &, etc.) and use minimum words/characters while filling the University Name, Specializations, Major Responsibilities, Address, Board & School Name, and similar fields.

Round off the percentage obtained in degrees/diplomas to the lower whole number (e.g., 49.3% or 49.8% should be entered as 49%, not 50%). Where grades are awarded, convert them to numerical equivalent percentages.
Upload a resume file not exceeding 100 KB.
Ensure you have a valid personal email address, since ICSI will communicate with applicants through email and not by post.
Submit the online application before the closing date of 12 August 2026.
Take a printout of the submitted online form for future reference. Do not send a hard copy of the application form, CV, or certificates to the Institute; no separate acknowledgement will be sent.

content_sections.heading: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Notification
content_sections.text: ICSI is a statutory body set up under the Company Secretaries Act, 1980, functioning under the jurisdiction of the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, to regulate and develop the profession of Company Secretaries in India. A direct notification PDF link was not available in the source used for this article; candidates should check www.icsi.edu for the official notification. ICSI Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Apply Online for ICSI Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026

rows.details: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)

rows.event: Cut-off Date for Age, Qualifications & Experience

content_sections.heading: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 20 posts are for placement at ICSI Chapter Offices, Regional Offices, CCGRTs across India, and Headquarters (New Delhi/Noida). Candidates cannot claim any right or preference for posting in a particular State or city, as selection and posting are made on an All India basis; candidates are liable to be posted or transferred anywhere in India.

content_sections.heading: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate in Commerce. Minimum 3 years of experience. Training experience forming a part of the curriculum of any Degree/Diploma will not be counted towards the total experience. The indicative job contents for candidates selected for Chapter Offices are as follows: To take day-to-day decisions for smooth working of the Chapter office and to improve the services of members/students in consultation with the Chairman To operate the bank accounts jointly with the office bearers of the Chapter, within certain monetary limits as may be decided by the Regional Council/Chapter To initial all the receipt & payment vouchers before placing the same to the Chairman/Treasurer for approval To attend all the meetings of the Managing Committee of the Chapter and to assist the Secretary in drafting the agenda/minutes To strictly follow the purchase procedure/manual for procuring material/services, with the proprietary aspect of all expenses specifically looked into To authenticate all the MIS reports or reports required to be sent to various Directorates of the Headquarters Such other duties as may be assigned from time to time by the Headquarters of the Institute The job contents for candidates selected for offices other than Chapter Offices will be as decided by the respective Directorate/Office.

content_sections.heading: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for the post of Executive Assistant, as on 01 July 2026, is 35 years.

content_sections.heading: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee has been specified in the notification.

content_sections.heading: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made through a Written Test of Objective Type (MCQ), broadly covering the following topics: Basic Accounting General English Basic Mathematics Computer Knowledge Quantitative Aptitude Reasoning General Knowledge & Current Affairs Mere submission of application or fulfilment of eligibility conditions does not confer any right on a candidate to be shortlisted or called for the written test. ICSI reserves the right to call for the written test only those candidates who, in its opinion, are most suitable for the post, and reserves the right to reject any or all applications without assigning any reason. ICSI's decision on eligibility, shortlisting, conduct of the written test, and selection will be final and binding, and no correspondence will be entertained in this regard. No Travel Allowance shall be reimbursed for attending the written test.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for ICSI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates working in a Central/State Government/Autonomous/Statutory Body/PSU must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer at the time of verification of original documents. Original documents will be required for verification only after the written test, for candidates who fall in the list of consideration. All educational qualifications must be from recognized universities/institutions in India or abroad; courses offered by autonomous institutions should be equivalent to courses approved/recognized by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU)/UGC/AICTE.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICSI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the online application link: https://stimulate.icsi.edu/RECRUITMENT/IndexHome/IndexHome Fill the online Resume Form carefully, ensuring all relevant fields relating to qualifications, experience, etc. are duly completed. Avoid entering special characters (such as " ", ' ', &, etc.) and use minimum words/characters while filling the University Name, Specializations, Major Responsibilities, Address, Board & School Name, and similar fields. Round off the percentage obtained in degrees/diplomas to the lower whole number (e.g., 49.3% or 49.8% should be entered as 49%, not 50%). Where grades are awarded, convert them to numerical equivalent percentages. Upload a resume file not exceeding 100 KB. Ensure you have a valid personal email address, since ICSI will communicate with applicants through email and not by post. Submit the online application before the closing date of 12 August 2026. Take a printout of the submitted online form for future reference. Do not send a hard copy of the application form, CV, or certificates to the Institute; no separate acknowledgement will be sent.

faq.question: Q1. How many Executive Assistant vacancies has ICSI announced in Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ICSI has announced 20 Executive Assistant vacancies under Advt. No. 04/2026, distributed as UR-08, EWS-02, OBC-05, SC-03, and ST-02.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application link is active from 22 July 2026, and the last date for applying online is 12 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ICSI Executive Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years, as on 01 July 2026, which is also the cut-off date for all purposes including qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for ICSI Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate in Commerce with a minimum of 3 years' experience. Training experience forming part of a Degree/Diploma curriculum is not counted towards the required experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the ICSI Executive Assistant post?
faq.answer: The post carries Pay Level 4 (25500-81100) as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, with a gross salary of approximately Rs. 6.51 lakh per annum.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for ICSI Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Written Test of Objective Type (MCQ), covering Basic Accounting, General English, Basic Mathematics, Computer Knowledge, Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, and General Knowledge & Current Affairs.

faq.question: Q7. Where will ICSI Executive Assistant candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates can be posted anywhere in India — at ICSI's Headquarters (New Delhi/Noida), CCGRTs (Mumbai, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Manesar), Regional Offices (New Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, Chennai), or Chapter Offices, as selection and posting are made on an All India basis.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any Travel Allowance for the ICSI written test?
faq.answer: No, ICSI has specified that no Travel Allowance shall be reimbursed for attending the written test.
